nodes.name: Upload Video and Description to Tiktok
nodes.notes: Generate in upload-post.com the token and add to the credentials in the header-> Authorization: Apikey (token here)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (() => { const getNodeData = (name) => { try { return $(name).item?.json ?? null; } catch (error) { return null; } }; const run = getNodeData('Get a row') ?? {}; const stages = run.stages ?? {}; const clone = (value) => (value && typeof value === 'object' ? { ...value } : {}); const ideaStage = clone(stages.idea_generation); if (!ideaStage.status) { ideaStage.status = 'completed'; } const screenplayStage = clone(stages.screenplay); if (!screenplayStage.status) { screenplayStage.status = 'completed'; } const videoStage = clone(stages.video_generation); if (!videoStage.status) { videoStage.status = 'completed'; } const publishingStage = clone(stages.publishing); const tiktokUrl = $json.response?.url ?? $json.data?.url ?? null; const caption = $('AI Agent').item?.json?.output?.caption ?? null; const publishingOutput = { ...(publishingStage?.output ?? {}), tiktokUrl, platform: 'tiktok', caption, completedAt: new Date().toISOString() }; const updatedPublishingStage = { ...publishingStage, status: 'completed', output: publishingOutput }; const mergedOutput = { ...(run.output ?? {}), publishing: { ...(run.output?.publishing ?? {}), ...publishingOutput } }; return { status: 'completed', currentStage: 'publishing', stages: { idea_generation: ideaStage, screenplay: screenplayStage, video_generation: videoStage, publishing: updatedPublishingStage }, output: mergedOutput };
})() }}

={{ (() => { const getNodeData = (name) => { try { return $(name).item?.json ?? null; } catch (error) { return null; } }; const run = getNodeData('Get a row') ?? {}; const stages = run.stages ?? {}; const clone = (value) => (value && typeof value === 'object' ? { ...value } : {}); const ideaStage = clone(stages.idea_generation); if (!ideaStage.status) { ideaStage.status = 'completed'; } const screenplayStage = clone(stages.screenplay); if (!screenplayStage.status) { screenplayStage.status = 'completed'; } const videoStage = clone(stages.video_generation); if (!videoStage.status) { videoStage.status = 'completed'; } const publishingStage = { ...clone(stages.publishing), status: 'failed', error: { message: $json.error?.message ?? 'TikTok upload workflow failed.', stack: $json.error?.stack ?? null, lastNode: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted ?? null } }; return { status: 'failed', currentStage: 'publishing', stages: { idea_generation: ideaStage, screenplay: screenplayStage, video_generation: videoStage, publishing: publishingStage }, output: { ...(run.output ?? {}), publishing: { ...(run.output?.publishing ?? {}), error: { message: $json.error?.message ?? 'TikTok upload workflow failed.', stack: $json.error?.stack ?? null, lastNode: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted ?? null } } } };
})() }}
